title: carmichaelia juncea
intro: Carmichaelia juncea, also known as the Juncea broom or broom spurge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carmichaelia juncea include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable treatment for various skin issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, typically made into infusions, tinctures, or salves to treat skin conditions and promote overall skin health.
